revision.comment: Changed protection settings for "[[Template:If]]": Always cascade protected via main page, for consistency ([Edit=Require administrator access] (indefinite) [Move=Require administrator access] (indefinite))
1 revision imported: impoting nglish ikipdia tmplats
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>p{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifeq:{{{1}}}|eq|1|2}}|{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>p{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifeq:{{{2}}}|{{{3}}}|1|2}}|{{{4|}}}|{{{5|}}}}}|{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>p{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#if{{{1}}}:{{{2}}}|1|2}}|{{{3}}}|{{{4|}}}}}}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}} </noinclude>
[[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:If]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]]

revision.comment: Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) to last revision by [[User:Pppery|Pppery]]
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]

revision.comment: add parser function per [[Wikipedia talk:Template messages#parser]]
add parser function per [[Wikipedia talk:Template messages#parser]]
add parser function per [[Wikipedia talk:Template messages#parser]]
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Wasy Ples|Wasy Ples]] ([[User talk:Wasy Ples|talk]]) to last version by Patrick
add parser function per [[Wikipedia talk:Template messages#parser]]
add parser function per [[Wikipedia talk:Template messages#parser]]

Changed protection level for "[[Template:If]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]] ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
add parser function per [[Wikipedia talk:Template messages#parser]]
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Wasy Ples|Wasy Ples]] ([[User talk:Wasy Ples|talk]]) to last version by Patrick
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>p{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifeq:{{{1}}}|eq|1|2}}|{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>p{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifeq:{{{2}}}|{{{3}}}|1|2}}|{{{4|}}}|{{{5|}}}}}|{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>p{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#if{{{1}}}:{{{2}}}|1|2}}|{{{3}}}|{{{4|}}}}}}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23458359115|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>p{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifeq:{{{1}}}|eq|1|2}}|{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>p{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifeq:{{{2}}}|{{{3}}}|1|2}}|{{{4|}}}|{{{5|}}}}}|{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>p{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#if{{{1}}}:{{{2}}}|1|2}}|{{{3}}}|{{{4|}}}}}}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>p{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifeq:{{{1}}}|eq|1|2}}|{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>p{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#ifeq:{{{2}}}|{{{3}}}|1|2}}|{{{4|}}}|{{{5|}}}}}|{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>p{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#if{{{1}}}:{{{2}}}|1|2}}|{{{3}}}|{{{4|}}}}}}}<noinclude>
